_note: Label Sprint round for er — generated er_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the endoplasmic reticulum.

hotspots.label: Nuclear envelope
hotspots.detail: The double membrane enclosing the nucleus, continuous with the ER.

hotspots.label: Rough endoplasmic reticulum
hotspots.detail: A stack of flattened sacs studded with ribosomes; synthesises proteins.

hotspots.label: Ribosome
hotspots.detail: A small granule on the rough ER surface where proteins are assembled.

hotspots.label: Smooth endoplasmic reticulum
hotspots.detail: A tubular network with no ribosomes; makes lipids and detoxifies.

generation_prompt: endoplasmic reticulum, 3D detail, rough and smooth regions
